title: MLSU Admission Form 2026-27

detail.short_info: MLSU Admission Form 2026-27 is open. Last date for BVA is 08 May 2026 and for B.Tech is 10 May 2026. Apply online for Bachelor of Visual Arts and B.Tech courses at mlsuadmissions.sumsraj.com.

content.text: MLSU Admission Form 2026-27 is now open. Mohanlal Sukhadia University (MLSU), Udaipur has started the online application process for various undergraduate programmes for the academic session 2026-27. Currently, applications are invited for Bachelor of Visual Arts (BVA) and B.Tech courses in different semesters. Interested candidates can apply online before the last date. BVA courses close on 08 May 2026 while B.Tech programmes close on 10 May 2026. Apply now through the official admission portal.
